plan_metadata.name: group  validation basic ai chat bot in copilot

steps.description: Click the "Message Copilot" input field to add a new message in the agent chat within the M365 Copilot web application.

parameters.text: How can I develop agents with Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit?

steps.description: Enter the text "How can I develop agents with Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit?" into the "Message Copilot" input box within the M365 Copilot web interface, under the selected agent "vscuse_app_PQf3Hlocal".
Press Enter to submit the question "How can I develop agents with Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit?" in the chat input box of the M365 Copilot web interface.
@assertion bot has responsed user's question and  without any error content.
